24
25
26 Man Tax: Adam Huber
"Education is what survives when what has been learned has been forgotten." - B.F. Skinner So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Free Canadian heathcare saved my life
item.description: Canadian here. Came back from a vacation in Italy. The long flight, combined with a pre-existing condition, left me with a blood clot in my leg. Was rushed to the ER. Had tests, saw a specialist, got on meds... long story short, my life was saved (for the 2nd time!) by the incredibly fast and skilled healthcare workers in Ontario. Is Canadian healthcare 'free'? No, we pay for it in taxes. A lot. Is it perfect? Heck no. Ask anyone who lives here. We have problems. BUT, did it literally save my life, and leave me with zero bills afterwards? Yes. I wrote the book ARENA MODE as a love letter to Canadian healthcare after I nearly died 19 years ago. And now, it saved me again. I'm not going to comment on American heathcare because I don't live in the US, so I'm not comparing. I'm just grateful that I live here and have access to this care (or I would no longer be alive... or an Imgurian!!) Take care of your health, stay safe, and if you have access to world class healthcare, be thankful! Love you guys! - Blake TL;DR: Almost died. Didn't. Thank you, Canada. xox
item.dc:creator: BlakeNorthcott

Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: The Man can’t miss
item.description:
https://www.nytimes.com/2026/06/25/nyregion/nyc-rent-freeze-vote-mamdani.html
Of course the land lords are already whining about it
The man has been in charge all of 6 months. Walked in, and immediately started turning off the baby crushing machines that every liberal could have at any moment and CHOSE NOT TO. If you don’t consider yourself a socialist yet, what are you waiting for?!?

item.title: Tim Sweeney needs to shut the f*ck up.
item.description: https://www.gamesradar.com/games/epic-games-boss-calls-steam-ai-disclosures-really-irresponsible-of-valve-as-they-make-it-much-much-much-harder-for-a-game-developer-to-have-a-chance-of-success/ TLDR Steam requires devs to disclose if AI was used in the development of the games they post on their site/service. Tim Sweeney, the owner of Epic Games and the Epic store, claims this will just hurt sales and small developers. Tim should shut the fuck up. I looked into it and found Steam's Policy. What MUST be Declared: "Any generative AI used to create content that ships with the game." "Any kind of content created with the help of AI tools while the game is running." https://steamcommunity.com/groups/steamworks/announcements/detail/3862463747997849619
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost

item.title: Trump claims thugs knifed the reflection pool. Jim Acosta went to see for himself and confirmed what every person on Earth already knows.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Buster Keaton.
item.description: Buster Keaton had Undiagnosed Broken Neck. While filming a water spout scene for Sherlock Jr (1924), Keaton was slammed onto train tracks by a massive torrent of water, fracturing his cervical spine. He completed the film and only discovered the break more than a decade later via an X-ray.
item.dc:creator: iceage2012

item.title: Trans Galaxy makeup
item.description: I was inspired by my dear friend, NsomniaksDream. You can find her artwork here https://www.nsomniaksdream.com/. I've done the rainbow and the lesbian flag too thus far, just haven't uploaded them yet because I wanted to prioritise allyship with the trans community first. Happy Pride! Remember, the more we choose love and acceptance, the better the world becomes. You can play a piano with half the keys, but when played with all the keys, it's a more fulfilling and joyous harmony. The more candles we light, the brighter the room becomes. Love, as always, MCroft07. x
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Blade
item.dc:creator: knightmage15

item.title: Amphifa
item.description: On Monday night, Trump sat down and posted a photograph of a protester in a giant inflatable frog costume. The frog was labeled "Amphifa." It was holding a sign reading "First they came for the algae." And Trump could not let the frog win. "Here is another example of a crazy pro-algae (likely paid) protestor," he wrote, deadly serious. Every joke at his expense lands like a wound, and he has to swing back at all of them.
item.dc:creator: Detacheddavid

item.title: Millennial things
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
People are either big babies during sickness or they refuse to be sick.
Maybe it’s supposed to keep away the mosquitos?
Would consider infanticide
This is how you get ants
In America (where I live, anyway) it’s called ding dong ditch
If you think foil is going to stop mind control, you are naive. It’s the media you consume that controls your mind.
Maybe this is how superhuman rumors got started. Triplets on the battlefield.
lol it looks like an ornament
Aw, I wonder which kid it was
So, is it edible?
Had all three at different points. They sucked.
Classy and sassy
Oh, so THAT’S why I have never done meth
Auntie played the long game
Can confirm.
Hey, those are misspelled!
I see them in you
They cater to a strange crowd anyway
What do you think would make a good slogan?
Blasphemic sponges was not on my bingo card today
They’re still good products
Why did they give us candy cigarettes and gum cigars during the DARE era?
I miss cool electronics
I had the bottom left one
Getting the black ones was the height of fa-shun at 13 years
The ball saucer thing was useless
I was cucumber melon. What about you?
It was.
I had SO many
Now we call it cottagecore or grannycore
Lasted for 30 years
I loved them
Plastic shoes is where I draw the line
My mom wouldn’t buy them. They look disgusting now
We all used the toe method to turn on the computer
Whatever! All of mine were amazing
It lasted for like, a year
Worth it
Yes
I think they’re fun
It made life interesting
I want a bunny one
I had forgotten about mighty Max
They don’t even do birthday parties anymore
Fafo
She knows what’s important
We had these
Aww
We yearn for more Agatha Christie
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1729 (Baja hard time)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [beep] ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
